name: Grilled Pork Tenderloin W/Steamed Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1 pork tenderloin, cut into 2-3 inch round medallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the pork tenderloin of excess fat.
2. Cut the pork into 2-3 inch round medallions.
3. Make small slits in each medallion using a sharp knife.
4. Slip a slice of garlic into each slit.
5. Sprinkle with a little rosemary.
6. Grill the pork until done.
7. Meanwhile, put asparagus in a second grill pan with enough water to fill the grooves.
8. Cover and steam until the asparagus is crisp-tender.
